name: vera-stat-application-pipeline
description: End-to-end applied statistical research pipeline. Takes a research question and dataset, runs literature review, statistical analysis with parallel method tracks, and produces a complete manuscript (Markdown + LaTeX/PDF). Use when user says "application pipeline", "applied analysis", "analyze my data and write paper", "end-to-end analysis", or wants to go from raw data to manuscript. Covers all outcome types: continuous, binary, ordinal, nominal, count, survival, repeated measures, time series, multivariate, DOE, meta-analysis, and SEM. Human-in-the-loop by design: the skill handles the standardized workflow, while the user owns study framing, high-stakes judgment, and final sign-off.
